calculation_rules_page.title: Calculation Rules
calculation_rules_page.sub_title: This screen displays the calculation rules and data used by the system to calculate hours and bonuses. The information is shown for transparency and cannot be edited.

card_extra_hours.title: 🕒 Overtime (OT)
card_extra_hours.sub_title: Overtime calculation is done in three payment tiers, based on the number of hours worked per day.

card_salary_additions.title: 💰 Hourly Salary Bonuses
card_salary_additions.sub_title: Salary bonuses vary based on the time of day the work is performed. Bonuses are marked as "+" and added to the base salary.

accordion_weekday.title: Weekday
accordion_weekday.sub_title: On a regular weekday, salary bonuses depend on the time of day the work is performed. Overtime (OT) may also apply.
accordion_weekday.note_midnight: * Shifts crossing midnight are calculated as a single workday.
accordion_weekday.note_next_day: ** The shift continues to the next day.

accordion_friday.title: Friday & Holiday Eves
accordion_friday.sub_title: On Fridays and holiday eves, bonuses are higher, especially approaching the start of Shabbat/holiday.
accordion_friday.note_midnight: * Shifts crossing midnight are calculated as a single workday.
accordion_friday.note_next_day: ** The shift continues to the next day.
accordion_friday.tip_auto: • Detection is automatic based on the date.

accordion_shabbat.title: Shabbat & Holidays
accordion_shabbat.sub_title: On Shabbat and holidays, Shabbat pay is applied (base + high bonus), without overtime (OT) calculation.
accordion_shabbat.note_midnight: * Shifts crossing midnight are calculated as a single workday.
accordion_shabbat.note_next_day: ** The shift continues to the next day.

card_meal_allowance.title: 🍽️ Meal & Per Diem Allowance
card_meal_allowance.sub_title: Payments for meals – meal allowance (food, drinks, accommodation) and per diem – paid according to work hours and eligibility conditions.

accordion_eligibility.title: Meal Allowance Eligibility
accordion_eligibility.description: Meal allowance is calculated only on days with at least one shift in the position, counting only hours actually worked in the position.

accordion_per_diem.title: Per Diem Rates
accordion_per_diem.row_overtime_2h_no_meal: At least 2 overtime hours (no meal agreement)

accordion_limitations.title: Selection Limitations
accordion_limitations.text_1: The system allows simulations and calculation checks starting from November 2015.
accordion_limitations.text_2: Calculations cannot be performed for future months, as future changes in conditions, regulations, or agreements may affect the calculation method, and preparation time is required accordingly.
accordion_limitations.text_3: In the current year, only months up to the current month can be selected, for the same reason.

accordion_disclaimers.title: Disclaimers
accordion_disclaimers.text_1: The system calculation is for estimation purposes only and does not replace an official report and/or official pay slip.
accordion_disclaimers.text_2: Differences may occur based on personal agreements or internal procedures.
